name: Pot 'n Cot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from the pot-roast and place it in a Dutch oven or electric frying pan to obtain 2 tablespoons of drippings. Discard the remaining fat.
2. Brown the meat on both sides in the drippings. Pour off the drippings.
3. Drain the apricots, reserving the liquid to pour over the beef.
4. Sprinkle onion, marjoram, basil, and pepper on both sides of the beef.
5. Cover tightly and cook slowly for 2 to 3 hours, until tender.
6. Add sherry and salt; cook uncovered for 30 minutes or until the liquid has cooked down to a syrup, basting the meat frequently.
7. Place the pot-roast on a platter and spoon the syrup over it. (Any remaining syrup may be served as an accompaniment.)
8. Arrange apricots around the pot-roast and garnish with parsley.
9. To serve, slice across the grain of the meat.
